impact: This directly addresses the current syntax-preflight failure loop by using a tiny pure-Python guardrail with no live DevHub behavior, no broad contract changes, and explicit self-tests for the four-round recovery prompt requirements.
summary: Replace the repeated no-accepted-patch guardrail helper with a minimal syntax-safe implementation and daemon-local synthetic tests.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 18 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
